roa.docketEntryComment: PET & ORDER TO SUSP FEE PER SFBOS 180132 SIGNED AND FILED
PROB TRANSFER TO STANISLAUS COUNTY SENT

/CAL: APD 1203,9PC  MOTION TO TRANSFER PROBATION FROM SAN FRANCISCO  COUNTYTO STANISLAUS COUNTY/DAWT/MO GRTD/CTORD: PROBATION IS TRANSFERRED FROM SANFRANCISCO COUNTY TO STANISLAUS COUNTY/X:COURT ORDER IS SIGNED AND FILED,/
/CAL:APD MOTION/DAWT/X:APD HAS DETERMINED THAT THERE IS NO RESTITUTION OWED,/X:ALL ORIGINAL TERMS AND CONDITIONS REMAIN,/X:COURT RETAINS JURISDICTION FOR ANY FUTURE RESTITUTION CLAIMS,/

/CAL:SENTENCING/AJW/CH1:ISS:PROB 3 Y:PJ 19 D/CTS:19/24MREVIEW/DNACOMP/IND/SA1:ALFONSO PULIDO & STEVEN BARBIERIE/DEF:MUST NOT COME WITHIN50 YARDS OFTHE PROTECTED PERSONS NAMED ABOVE/ /X:COURT MANDATES COMPLETION OF ANGER MANAGEMENT CLASSES/VF4:300/PC/PSR/BKFEE/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/RESTV/WS/DTC/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/REMA/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/LDPX:07-17-15/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:1/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES:08-19-15/OR/X:6 MONTH HAMMER IF DEFENDANT FAILS TO COMPLY WITH COURT ORDERS/ARBUCKLE/IBARRA/SAORD/SA1: ALFONSO PULIDO AND STEVEN BARBIERIE/SAORD2/DEF:MUST NOT COME WITHIN 50 YARDS OF THE PROTECTED PERSONS NAMED ABOVE/TWS/DOP

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/DEFENSE'S ORAL MOTION TO REDUCE ALL COUNTS TO MISDEMEANORS PURSUANT TO PC17B IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE,/TEXT:CONFL CNSL APPTD/X:THE PUBLIC DEFENDER'S OFFICE DECLARES A CONFLICT,/CON:PAMELA HERZIG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW/LDPX: 07-17-15/987,2/BAIL: 150,000/SAORD/SA1:MICHAEL BARBIERI, STEVEN BARBIERI, & ALFONSO PULIDO (150 YDS)/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
